about: Suggest an idea or improvement for avatar
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Scope

- [ ] New platform adapter
- [ ] New model provider
- [ ] New scanner / security hook
- [ ] Trigger / scheduling behavior
- [ ] Observability
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or screenshots about the feature request here.
